name: Sweet Waldorf Salad
directions: Place lemon juice in large bowl.
Remove cores from apples and discard.
Chop apples and coat in lemon juice to prevent oxidation.
Stir in raisins, pecans, and coconut.
Drizzle honey over mixture and blend well.
Add marshmallows and stir.
Fold in whipped topping, and chill.

name: Apple Brickle Dip
directions: In mixing bowl, beat cream cheese, sugars and vanilla.
Fold in brickle chips.
Serve with apples.
Refrigerate any leftovers.

name: Fall Apple Dip
directions: Blend together cream cheese, brown sugar, vanilla and peanuts.
Serve with sliced apples that have been dipped in lemon juice to prevent browning.

name: Peanut Butter Fruit Dip
directions: Mix yogurt, peanut butter, cinnamon, and fold in cool whip.
Serve with sliced apples, bananas, etc.

name: Apple Cheese Bites
directions: In a bowl, stir together cream cheese and craisins(or raisins). Spread the mixture on one side of the wedges. Sprinkle with cinnamon and nutmeg, if using. Enjoy!

name: Creamy Apple Bites
directions: Put softened cream cheese on "Ritz" crackers.
Place a slice of apple on which you have sprinkled lemon juice - so apple won't turn brown, on each cracker.
Sprinkle with cinnamon sugar.
Serve.

name: Apple Ring Snacks
directions: Immediately after slicing up the apples, spread the peanut butter on the slices to avoid the apples turning brown.
Garnish with the trail mix and enjoy!

name: Impressive Caramel Apple Dip
directions: Place caramels in a microwave-safe bowl.
Microwave, uncovered, on high for 1 minute.
Add marshmallows and microwave for 1 minute or until marshmallows are melted, stirring occassionally.
Whisk in butter and cream until combined.
Serve with apple slices.
Refrigerate leftovers.

name: Pb & H Honey & Apple Sammie
directions: In a medium bowl, beat cream cheese until fluffy. Add honey, vanilla extract and cinnamon; mix well.

Spread 2 tablespoons peanut butter on 4 slices of bread. Top peanut butter with 1-2 tablespoons of honey cream cheese mixture. Layer with apple slices, dividing evenly. Sprinkle with sunflower seeds. Place remaining 4 slices of bread face down on top of cream cheese and apple slices.
Cut sandwiches into halves or quarters and serve.
